description: Log in to Moodle (http://localhost/moodle) as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). In the "Introduction to Biology" (BIO101) course, create a collaborative wiki named "Biology Lab Notebook" with the description "Collaborative wiki for documenting lab procedures, terminology, and study notes". The wiki's first page, "Lab Safety Procedures", must contain the text: "Always wear safety goggles and gloves when handling chemicals". Create a second page named "Cell Structure Notes" containing the text: "The mitochondria is the powerhouse of the cell". Ensure both pages are saved.
